CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Continued To Mar-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION & Notice Of Motion To Lift The Stay And Reinstate Action
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christianne T. Crotty, (415) 290-7179 Plaintiff In Pro Per (via ZOOM)
MATTHEW K. YAN, ESQ., Deputy City Attorney (415) 554-3845 matthew.yan@sfcityatty.org Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
Reported by For The Record

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHRISTIANNE CROTTY's Motion To Lift The Stay And Reinstate Action.

Plaintiff Christianne Crotty's motion to lift stay and reinstate action is denied. Alternative relief sought by Plaintiff Crotty is denied.

The original order to stay this action was issued on March 14, 2024. This court issued orders to stay similar cases and upheld those orders in September 2023 and January 2025. This court's previous analysis under Caifa Professional Law Corp. v. State Farm Fire and Casualty Co. (1993) 15 Cal.App.4th 800 remains the same as in the original stay and in the denial of motions to lift the stay in other similar state cases. Lifting the stay would create concerns of duplicative discovery efforts and inconsistent rulings.

Proposed order submitted.

Visiting Judge: John M. True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Recorded by "For The Record" (301/JMT)

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Ms. Crotty requests to change the continuance date. The Clerk informs the party to send an email to calendar302@sftc.org once parties have agreed on a new date. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS.

Continued to January 29, 2024 to be heard by Judge Ulmer.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
